plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Azure OpenAI js remote debug

steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" modal dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "JavaScript" option from the programming language dropdown in the VS Code interface.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.

Click the "View provisioned resources" button in the Notifications panel of Visual Studio Code, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace. This action confirms successful provisioning and deploy stages, as indicated by the notification details.
Use the keyboard shortcut **Ctrl+Shift+P** to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code, within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" workspace interface.

Type the text "notifications: clear" into the VS Code Command Palette input field at the top center of the Visual Studio Code window, triggering the "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" suggestion.
Press Enter to select "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" from the VS Code command palette.
